message:
Add hostcall capability denial matrix test covering all policy modes

- extensions.rs: Add js_hostcall_capability_denial_matrix_emits_deterministic_errors_and_logs
  test (292 lines) that exercises the hostcall dispatch policy engine across
  three ExtensionPolicyMode variants:
  - Strict mode: verifies 6 capability classes (exec, http, session, ui,
    events, write) are denied with deterministic error codes and messages
  - Prompt mode: verifies the same 6 capabilities are denied when the UI
    prompt handler returns false (spawns a background thread to auto-respond)
  - Permissive mode: verifies deny_caps list still overrides permissive
    policy for explicitly blocked capabilities (http)
- Each denial is verified against both the HostcallOutcome::Error return
  value (code="denied", message contains capability and reason) and the
  tracing event log (policy.decision at WARN level with matching fields)
- Helper functions: to_request(), assert_denied(), assert_policy_decision_logged()
  provide reusable assertion infrastructure for future policy tests

This is the first test that validates the full policy decision matrix
end-to-end, ensuring that capability gating produces auditable, structured
denial outcomes regardless of the policy mode in effect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
